Compliance.description: Established franchise with 25+ years, featured in 2025 industry report; no negative regulatory findings or licensing issues reported.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Mixed HelloPeter reviews: 3.7/5 overall (15 reviews), 5/5 for Montana branch (14 reviews); recent 2025/2026 reviews show both praise for thoroughness and complaints about service quality.

Product Value.description: Broad service range including specialized cleaning; value promised via time/money savings but mixed feedback on pricing and quality.

Innovation.description: No app, digital booking, or tech adoption evident; traditional team-based cleaning services.

Customer Support.description: Worry-Free Promise offered but complaints about poor response, disappearing after payment, and unresolved issues like broken items.

Accessibility & Security.description: No app or digital platform; traditional service with no mentions of data security, POPIA compliance, or inclusivity features. Basic website access.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Not publicly listed; franchise starts from R25,000 per service division; described as affordable but some complaints of high costs

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed HelloPeter (3.7 overall, some branches 5/5), Snupit mixed; recent 2026 reviews include negatives on service/management.
